results.rendered_html:
carman n.  Uṇ. 4,146 .
1〉 Haut, Fell  AK. 2,7,46 .  TRIK. 3,3,237 .  H. 630 . an. 2,263 .  MED. n. 63 . carmevodabhirvyundanti bhūmim  ṚV. 1,85,5 . yayā dhiyā gāmariṇīta carmaṇaḥ 3,60,2 . 1,110,8 . 161,7 . 4,13,4 . 36,4 . vi yo jaghāna śamiteva carma 5,85,1 . 6,8,3 . carmeva yaḥ samavivyaktamāṃsi 7,63,1 . carmāṇi mlātāni  VĀLAKH. 6,3 .  AV. 5,8,13 . 10,9,2 . 11,1,9 . 14,2,22 . 24 .  TS. 3,1,7,1 . 6,1,9,2 . aukṣṇa  ŚAT. BR. 1,2,5,2 . 4,5,13 . śārdūla˚ 5,3,5,3 . vaśā˚  KĀTY. ŚR. 13,3,12 . basta˚ 18,5,12 . anustaraṇyā goścarmādhiṣavaṇam  ŚĀṄKH. ŚR. 14,22,17 .  NIR. 2,5 .  M. 2,41 . 174 . 5,119 . 6,6 . 76 . saromṇi carmaṇi  SUŚR. 1,29,5 . carmabāla 2,495,19 .  HIT. 32,13 . nirbhinnānyasya (viṣṇoḥ) carmāṇi lokapālo 'nilo 'viśat  BHĀG. P. 3,6,16 . carmapūraṃ (adv.) stṛṇāti  P. 3,4,31 , Sch. [Page2-0975] carmavat adv.  ŚVETĀŚV. UP. 6,20 .
— 2〉 Schild  AK. 2,8,2,58 .  TRIK.   H. 783 .  H. an.   MED.   MBH. 3,12585 . asicarmaṇi 1,4355 . asicarmabhṛt 3,14911 . carmaṇā saṃrurodha ca 7,559 .  DRAUP. 8,19 .  R. 5,73,10 .  BHĀG. P. 9,15,28 . haima 10,43 .
— Vgl. gala˚, duścarman.

results.rendered_html:
carman n. [car-manin  Uṇ. 4. 144 ]
1 Skin (of the body).
2 Leather, hide;  Ms. 2. 41 , 174. 
3 The sense of touch.
4 A shield;  Śi. 18. 21. 
Comp.
— aṃtaḥ a piece or strap of leather.
— aṃbhas n. lymph.
— avakartana working in leather.
— avakartina,
— avakartṛ m. a shoe-maker.
— kāraḥ,
— kārin, -kṛt m.
1 a shoe-maker, currier.
2 a mixed caste (from a Cāṇḍāla woman and a fisherman).
— kārakaḥ a worker in leather.
— kīlaḥ, -laṃ a wart.
— caṭakaḥ, -kā,
— caṭikā, -caṭī a bat.
— citrakaṃ white leprosy.
— jaṃ
1 hair.
2 blood.
— taraṃgaḥ a wrinkle.
— tila a. covered with pimples.
— daṃḍaḥ, -nālikā,
— nāsikā a whip.
— dalaṃ, -dūṣikā a kind of leprosy, cutaneous disease.
— drumaḥ, -vṛkṣaḥ the Bhūrja tree.
— paṭṭikā a flat piece of leather for playing upon with dice.
— patrā a bat, the small house-bat.
— pādukā a leather shoe.
— prabhedikā a shoemaker's awl.
— prasevakaḥ, -prasevikā a bellows.
— baṃdhaḥ a leather band or strap.
— muṃḍā an epithet of Durgā.
— yaṣṭiḥ f. a whip.
— vasanaḥ ‘clad in skin’, N. of Śiva.
— vādyaṃ a drum, tabor &c.
— saṃbhavā large cardamoms.
— sāraḥ lymph, serum.
